name: Satellogic Inc.
description: Satellogic Inc. is a vertically integrated Earth-observation company that designs, manufactures, and operates its own constellation of high-resolution satellites. The company provides accessible and affordable geospatial data, analytics, and satellite-as-a-service solutions to customers across various industries, including government, defense, energy, and finance. By leveraging its proprietary technology and automated platform, Satellogic enables high-frequency, high-resolution monitoring of the planet, empowering organizations to make data-driven decisions at scale. Headquartered in the United States, the company focuses on delivering actionable insights through its advanced satellite imagery and sophisticated AI-driven analysis tools.
